offer: For property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month, inconsistent billing causes cash flow gaps. We provide bill extraction and variance alerts instead of manual tracking in spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking and managing utility expenses across multiple properties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums where property managers share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for utility bill details and alerts
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
